title: Pandit Commercial Complex
description: A state-of-the-art 7-story commercial center with modern amenities, automated parking, and eco-friendly features.

timeline.description: Foundation concrete casting and 7 floors structural framework completed.
Finishing, interior electrification, and client handover successfully finalized.

title: State Highway Route 4
description: 4-lane highway expansion project spanning 12 kilometers including culvert installations and toll plaza layouts.

timeline.description: Earthwork excavation and layer leveling under progress.
Bridge culvert girders and RCC decks installed.
Commenced asphalt top paving on Section A and B.

title: Pandit Green Heights Res
description: Premium residential luxury towers with 2BHK/3BHK smart layouts, landscaped gardens, and a grand clubhouse.

timeline.description: Deep basement piling and soil stabilization complete.
Main concrete raft foundation successfully poured.
Floor 4 slab steel binding and electrical conduit laying underway.

title: Giga-Logistics PEB Warehouse
description: Construction of a 50,000 sq ft pre-engineered steel warehouse (PEB structure) featuring high-load concrete flooring and integrated storm drainage layout.

timeline.description: High-tonnage grading, soil compaction, and foundation layout completed.
Raft concrete pouring and anchor bolts alignment finalized.
Pre-engineered structural steel columns and rafters erection initiated.

title: Heritage Villa Restoration
description: Complete structural rehabilitation, retrofitting, and interior modern remodel of a 50-year-old heritage residential villa.

timeline.description: Structural stability audit and planning approved.
Retrofitting walls, beams, and columns concrete jacket casting complete.
Modern layout styling, MEP systems layout, and interior handover finalized.
